member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests
member.summary: This class contains the unit tests for the class.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.OrDefault_ReturnsExpected(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that returns the fallback value for null, empty, and whitespace-only inputs, and returns the original string otherwise.
member.param: The input string under test (may be null).
The fallback value to use when is blank.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.OrDefault_NullDefault_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the supplied default value is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.Truncate_ReturnsExpected(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that returns the original string when it is shorter than or equal to the limit, and returns the trimmed prefix otherwise.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.Truncate_NullString_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the source string is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.Truncate_NegativeMaxLength_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when maxLength is negative.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.Repeat_ReturnsExpected(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that correctly concatenates the string the requested number of times, including the edge cases of zero repetitions and an empty source string.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.Repeat_NullString_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the source string is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.Repeat_NegativeCount_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when count is negative.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.ContainsIgnoreCase_ReturnsExpected(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Verifies that correctly detects substrings regardless of case, and returns false for absent substrings.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.ContainsIgnoreCase_NullValue_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the source string is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.ContainsIgnoreCase_NullSubstring_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the substring argument is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.EqualsAnyIgnoreCase_ReturnsExpected(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Verifies that returns true when the source string matches any candidate (case-insensitive), and false when no candidate matches.
member.param: The set of candidate strings to compare against.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.EqualsAnyIgnoreCase_NoCandidates_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: Verifies that returns false when no candidates are provided.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.EqualsAnyIgnoreCase_NullValue_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the source string is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.EqualsAnyIgnoreCase_NullCandidates_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the candidates array is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.SplitAndTrim_TypicalInput_SplitsAndTrims
member.summary: Verifies that splits on the separator, trims leading and trailing whitespace from each segment, and returns only non-empty segments.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.SplitAndTrim_NoSeparator_ReturnsSingleElement
member.summary: Verifies that returns a single-element array when the separator is not present in the input.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.SplitAndTrim_EmptySegmentsAreRemoved
member.summary: Verifies that removes segments that become empty after the split (i.e., consecutive separators).

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.SplitAndTrim_WhitespaceOnlySegmentsAreRemoved
member.summary: Verifies that removes segments that consist entirely of whitespace after trimming.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.SplitAndTrim_EmptyInput_ReturnsEmptyArray
member.summary: Verifies that returns an empty array when the input string is empty.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Extensions.StringExtensionsTests.SplitAndTrim_NullValue_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that throws when the source string is null.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests
member.summary: This class contains the unit tests for the class.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.DefaultCtor_SetsAllFieldsToUnknown
member.summary: Verifies that the default (parameterless) constructor initializes every field to the sentinel string "unknown".

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.ParameterizedCtor_WithValidValues_SetsFields
member.summary: Verifies that the parameterized constructor stores all five non-null, non-empty arguments exactly as supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.ParameterizedCtor_WithAllNulls_FallsBackToUnknown
member.summary: Verifies that passing null for every argument falls back to "unknown" for each corresponding field.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.ParameterizedCtor_WithEmptyOrWhitespace_FallsBackToUnknown(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that empty strings and whitespace-only strings (space, tab, newline) are treated the same as null and replaced by "unknown".
member.param: The degenerate string value under test.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.PropertySetters_WithValidValues_UpdateFields
member.summary: Verifies that assigning valid (non-null, non-empty) strings via object-initializer syntax stores the exact values provided.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.PropertySetters_WithEmptyOrWhitespace_CoerceToUnknown(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that assigning an empty or whitespace-only string to a property coerces the stored value to "unknown" rather than retaining the invalid input.
member.param: The degenerate string value under test.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.PropertySetters_WithNull_CoerceToUnknown
member.summary: Verifies that assigning null to a property (suppressing the nullable warning with !) coerces the stored value to "unknown".

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.PropertySetters_MutateAfterConstruction
member.summary: Verifies that property values can be updated after initial construction and that only the mutated properties change — others remain at their original values.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.ToString_DefaultInstance_ReturnsAllUnknown
member.summary: Verifies that on a default instance produces the expected all-"unknown" formatted string.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.ToString_WithCustomValues_FormatsCorrectly
member.summary: Verifies that correctly interpolates all five custom field values into the expected format string.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_SameValues_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: Verifies that two distinct instances with identical field values are considered equal by both and the == operator.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_DifferentValues_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: Verifies that two instances that differ in at least one field are not considered equal.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_SameReference_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: Verifies that comparing an instance with itself via returns true (reflexivity).

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_NullOther_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: Verifies that comparing a non-null instance with null returns false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_BothNull_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: Verifies that comparing two null references with == returns true.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_BoxedObject_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: Verifies that returns true when passed a boxed with identical field values.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.Equals_BoxedNonAppInfoObject_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: Verifies that returns false when passed an object of an unrelated type.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.GetHashCode_EqualInstances_ReturnSameHash
member.summary: Verifies that two equal instances produce the same hash code, satisfying the contract between and .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Types.basic.AppInfoTests.GetHashCode_DefaultInstances_ReturnSameHash
member.summary: Verifies that two independently created default instances produce the same hash code.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests
member.summary: This class contains the unit tests for the class.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNull_WithNonNullValue_ReturnsValue
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNull returns the original value when a non-null string is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNull_WithNullValue_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNull throws with the correct parameter name when a null string reference is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNull_WithNonNullObject_ReturnsObject
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNull returns the exact same object reference when a non-null object is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullValue_WithValue_ReturnsUnwrapped
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullValue unwraps and returns the inner value when the nullable has a value.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullValue_WithNull_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullValue throws with the correct parameter name when the nullable has no value.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_WithValidString_ReturnsString
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty returns the original string when a non-null, non-empty value is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_WithNull_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty throws with the correct parameter name when null is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_WithEmptyString_ThrowsArgumentException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty throws with the correct parameter name when an empty string is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_WithWhitespace_DoesNotThrow
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty does NOT throw for a whitespace-only string — whitespace is not empty, only Guard.NotNullOrWhiteSpace rejects it.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrWhiteSpace_WithValidString_ReturnsString
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrWhiteSpace returns the original string when a non-null, non-whitespace value is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrWhiteSpace_WithNull_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrWhiteSpace throws with the correct parameter name when null is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrWhiteSpace_WithEmptyOrWhitespace_ThrowsArgumentException(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrWhiteSpace throws with the correct parameter name for empty strings and all common whitespace characters.
member.param: The degenerate string value under test.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNegative_WithZeroOrPositive_ReturnsValue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNegative returns the supplied value unchanged for zero and all positive integers.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNegative_WithNegative_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNegative throws with the correct parameter name for any negative integer.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.Positive_WithPositiveValue_ReturnsValue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.Positive returns the supplied value unchanged for any strictly positive integer.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.Positive_WithZeroOrNegative_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.Positive throws with the correct parameter name for zero and all negative integers.
member.param: The zero or negative integer under test.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.InRange_WithValueInRange_ReturnsValue(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.InRange returns the supplied value unchanged when it lies within the inclusive [min, max] range.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.InRange_WithValueOutsideRange_ThrowsArgumentOutOfRangeException(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.InRange throws with the correct parameter name when the value lies outside the inclusive [min, max] range.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.InRange_WithInvalidBounds_ThrowsArgumentException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.InRange throws when min is greater than max, which constitutes an invalid range specification.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_Collection_WithElements_ReturnsCollection
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty returns the original collection reference when the collection is non-null and contains elements.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_Collection_WithNull_ThrowsArgumentNullException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty throws with the correct parameter name when a null collection is supplied.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilClasses.Tests.Utilities.GuardTests.NotNullOrEmpty_Collection_WithEmpty_ThrowsArgumentException
member.summary: Verifies that Guard.NotNullOrEmpty throws with the correct parameter name when an empty collection is supplied.
